_note: Set 2026-05-23 after Step 8 cutover deleted legacy ColumnEditorPopover + per-type OptionsEditor files. Budget reflects the v2-only world: schema-driven editor (Pill/Knob/Field/Section/Accordion/Picker/Mode/Swatch/VariantPicker/ColumnPreview + ColumnEditorV2). Net +18 KB vs pre-Phase-7 because v2 is a richer surface than the editor it replaced.
_note_svg_generator: Bumped 2026-06-04 (wire-audit Pass 0d-ii). The committed bundle had been ~240-245 KB since the v3-to-v4 cutover sessions migrated svg-generator onto the v4 resolver (resolve-theme + component-tokens manifest now inline into the V8 bundle) — the 192000 budget predates that and was never reconciled because check:size is not yet a CI gate. Re-baselined at observed 249 KB (+0d-ii resolver-table refactor, +4 KB) with ~3% headroom. Prior note (multi-flex/aspect-ladder, ~+14 KB) retained for history.
_note_widget_1a: Bumped 2026-06-05 (wire-audit Pass 1a, per C42): shell/paper wrap template + scope-attribute deriveds (+~1.5 KB JS each; theme-runtime.css ships in tabviz.css, NOT JS). Both bundles were at 99.9% — re-baselined with ~2% headroom.
_note_arc_end: Re-baselined 2026-06-05 at the wire-audit arc close (v0.37.0 / wire 1.3): Passes 1b-5 added 5 presets, the glass resolver group, marks identity, caption primitives, and the studio tab rail since the budgets were last set (0d-ii / 1a). Observed: tabviz 773.8K, split 780.4K, svg 252.2K -> budgets set with ~2.5% headroom.
